---
url: "https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012761102-curl.md"
title: "修改结算账户-请求示例-curl"
doc_id: 4012761102
example_lang: "curl"
---

## curl


> POST

```
curl -X POST \
  https://api.mch.weixin.qq.com/v3/apply4sub/sub_merchants/1900006491/modify-settlement \
  -H "Authorization: WECHATPAY2-SHA256-RSA2048 mchid=\"1900000001\",..." \
  -H "Accept: application/json" \
  -H "Wechatpay-Serial: 5157F09EFDC096DE15EBE81A47057A7232F1B8E1"  \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "account_type" : "ACCOUNT_TYPE_BUSINESS",
    "account_bank" : "工商银行",
    "bank_name" : "中国工商银行股份有限公司北京市分行营业部",
    "bank_branch_id" : "402713354941",
    "account_number" : "",
    "account_name" : ""
  }'

```
